transcript.text: Here's how I blew up a YouTube short channel from basically nothing to 170 million views and 13k [music] in 28 days. And it's way easier than you think. First, I used vids.so to find a niche that was cooking. And after a bit of research, I found a niche that was insane. >> This brother is cooking. >> Then I cross-referenced that with the niche research section to see if there's still demand, which there was. So I found the biggest outliers in the last 30 days, found a video I wanted to replicate, a little bit of Google reverse image search, and I found the source video within a second. Recreated the whole thing in CapCut by editing it myself. Post the video and print views just like that. It's that simple. DM me the word cash and I'll send you a discount code for the tool.
